text: 0 ' No. 7/10/2003-NE-l (Pt)/NE-V Government of India Ministry of Home Affairs North Block, New Delhi 110001 Dated t h e l ^ July, 2017 OFFICE MEMORANDUM Subject: Extension of Notification declaring Nagaland as 'Disturbed Area' under Armed Forces (Special Powers) Act, 1958 (No.28 of 1958) regarding. The undersigned is directed to forward herewith a copy of the Notification No. S.O. 2043 (E) dated 30th June, 2017 regarding extension of Notification declaring Nagaland as 'Disturbed Area' under Armed Forces (Special Powers) Act, 1958 (No. 28 of 1958) for a period of six months with effect from 30th June, 2017 for record and information. (S^€TRawat) Section Officer, (NE-V) End: as above 1. Director, Intelligence Bureau, New Delhi. 2. D.G., BSF, CGO Complex, New Delhi. 3. D.G., CRPF, CGO Complex, New Delhi. 4. Director, (Shri Anshul Sharma), Cabinet Secretariat (R&AW), 10th floor (B-l & B-2 Wing), Paryavaran Bhawan CGO Complex, Lodhi Road, New Delhi-110003. 5. Director (G), M/O Defence, South Block New Delhi. 6. Army Headquarters, Director (Military Operations-ll), South Block, New ?lhi. SO (IT), MHA. The information may please be uploaded in the web-site of Ministry of Home Affairs accordingly for updation. -- 1 of 2 -- 5004/99 KS^Th I REGD. NO. D. Now. therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 3 of the Armed Forces (Special Powers) Act. 1958 (No. 28 of 1958) the Central Government hereby declares that whole of the said Slate to be a 'disturbed area' for a period of six months with effect from 30ih June. 201 7 for the purpose of that Act. [F. No. 7/10/2003-NE-I] SATYENDRA GARG. Jt. Secy. 4014 G1/2017 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press. Ring Road. Mayaptiri.
